porqueGt.titulo: Conventional map apps don't understand overland travel
porqueGt.p1: Map apps push you toward the fastest route — the main road, the shortcut, the most efficient path. For an overlander, what matters is the journey, not the destination.
porqueGt.p2: GT exists to fill that gap. An AI that understands overland travel, a database with over 4 million waypoints curated by our team and community, and an app built for those who need reliable information when the signal drops.
porqueGt.p3: We don't replace Google Maps for navigation. We become the intelligence behind support points — where to sleep, where to fuel up, where to eat, where to camp — alongside the route that makes sense for your way of traveling.
porqueGt.p4: When you finalize your itinerary, your trip moves from GT to Google Maps with a single tap. You get radar, live traffic and drive with CarPlay or Android Auto — rare among overlander apps.

hero.label: About GT Overlander
hero.titulo: More than a route planner — a road companion
hero.desc: GT exists to transform overland trip planning into a simple, intelligent, practical experience — made by travelers, for travelers.

missao.p1: GT Overlander is an app for people who travel overland — by car, motorcycle, 4x4 or motorhome. Born from the frustration with generic apps that don't understand the reality of someone who crosses borders, sleeps in wild campsites, or drives 5,000 km in a single trip.
missao.p2: GT understands travelers: the AI builds the route along roads that make sense, with cities along the way and regional context. The GT database of over 4 million waypoints in 209 countries covers what matters to those who have already decided where they're going — gas stations, accommodation, campsites, workshops, attractions. And integration with Google Maps, CarPlay and Android Auto takes everything to the car's dashboard.
missao.p3: More than a planner, GT is a road companion — made for those who don't see travel as just transportation, but as a unique experience.

fundador.imgAlt: Rangel Machado, founder of GT Overlander, in front of a Patagonian landscape
fundador.p1: Entrepreneur from Paraná, Brazil and traveler. He sees overlanding as one of the richest ways to know the world — and founded GT to be the app he wanted on his own journeys.
fundador.p2: Doesn't come from a technical background. Makes product decisions, listens to the community, and works side by side with the team to turn every personal experience into an app improvement.

comunidade.titulo: Getting to know travelers to build together
comunidade.p1: GT users aren't just wandering around. They've already decided to travel, know where they're going, and are in the moment of planning the route — where to stop, where to sleep, what to see on the road.
comunidade.p2: Understanding this journey — who travels, where to, in what vehicle, in what style — is what allows GT to continuously improve. Every real trip teaches something: routes that work, missing stops, regional contexts we haven't covered yet. That's where each layer of the app evolves from.
comunidade.p3: It's not a maps app. It's a living ecosystem, built together with those who travel — made to grow with the global overlanding community.

numeros.n3c: waypoints in our database — help us grow even more
numeros.rodape: App on iOS, Android and Web — compatible with CarPlay and Android Auto, in 3 languages (Portuguese, English, Spanish).

proximas.desc: GT is evolving into a complete ecosystem for those who live the road — connecting travelers, businesses, services and experiences.
proximas.p1d: Help Overlander for roadside rescue, GT Social for overlander social network, GT Explorer for reputation and ranking, GT Desapega for marketplace. In limited access — growing with the overlander community.
proximas.p2d: Physical POI, product seller and guided expedition services in a single business account. Available now, with volume scaling for larger networks.
proximas.p3d: Free downloads the country you're in with all waypoint categories; Plus and Pro unlock all 209 countries worldwide.
proximas.p4d: The waypoint base already covers 209 countries. Next steps: interface localization, partnerships with regional guides and multi-country commercial channels.

cta.desc: Download the app and start your next trip. Or, if you represent a business on travelers' routes, learn about the Business Account.

cta.desc: Start free. No card, no commitment.

hero.titulo: Choose the plan that matches your journey
hero.desc: Free to start. Plus for frequent travelers. Pro for those who never stop.

comparacao.desc: All plans have access to the database of over 4 million waypoints. Creating routes is unlimited for everyone — the difference is in exporting for navigation, heavy AI use and radar queries.
comparacao.f9l: View and contact listings on GT Desapega
comparacao.f11l: Copy public routes from other overlanders
comparacao.f15l: Offer help as a provider on Help Overlander

business.label: For those selling to the overlander world
business.desc: Single commercial plan, three usage fronts depending on your business:
business.w_titulo: Highlight your spot on the map
business.w_desc: Physical establishment — gas station, hotel, workshop, campsite, restaurant, attraction. Appears highlighted in the radar and planning of those traveling through the region.
business.p_desc: E-commerce, manufacturer, distributor of overlander equipment. List your products with a direct link to your store, marketplace or commercial WhatsApp.
business.s_desc: Guide, expedition driver, 4×4 instructor, route photographer. Appear in relevant regions and routes for those planning their trip.
business.pricing: Includes 1 highlighted spot and up to 15 products on Desapega. Add-ons available for more spots or products. Cancel anytime.

faq.a1: The Free plan isn't a trial — it's free forever. You use GT with standard AI, all available waypoints, CarPlay and Android Auto, with no deadline. When you want more, upgrade to Plus or Pro.
faq.a2: Yes. Cancel whenever you want, no penalty. The plan stays active until the end of the already-paid cycle and then automatically reverts to Free.
faq.q3: What's the difference between monthly and annual?
faq.a3: Anual tem desconto significativo: Plus mensal sai R$ 178,80/ano, anual sai R$ 79,90 (economia de 55%). Pro mensal sai R$ 238,80/ano, anual sai R$ 99,90 (economia de 58%). Mesmo plano, mesmas features — só muda o ciclo de cobrança.
faq.q4: How much does it cost in other currencies?
faq.a4: Prices in Brazilian Reals (R$) are the official ones. In other currencies, the app converts automatically based on your store's billing.
faq.q5: What happens to my routes if I cancel?
faq.a5: Your routes, stops and settings are never deleted — in any plan. What changes between plans is only how many times you can export the route for navigation. If you come back to Plus or Pro later, everything continues exactly where it was.
faq.a6: Yes. The Business Account is for those who sell to the overlander world — physical establishments (gas stations, campsites, guesthouses, workshops), recurring sellers (e-commerce, equipment manufacturers) and service providers (guides, expedition drivers). A separate plan from personal ones (Free/Plus/Pro). Details at /empresas.

cta.titulo: Start free and upgrade when you need to
cta.desc: No cancellation penalty. Your routes are saved even if you downgrade.

hero.desc: Send a message here, or use one of the direct channels below. We respond within 2 business days.

aside.suporteDesc: FAQ, popular topics and ticket submission
aside.empresasDesc: For establishments that want to appear on the map

hero.desc: The most common questions about GT Overlander. Didn't find yours?

faqPage.cat1a1: It's a route planning app for those who travel overland — by car, motorcycle, 4x4 or motorhome, anywhere in the world. Works for major expeditions and weekend trips alike. You describe the trip in natural language to an AI that builds the route, and complete it with stops from our database of over 4 million waypoints.
faqPage.cat1q2: What platforms does it work on?
faqPage.cat1a2: iOS, Android and Web (desktop access). Compatible with CarPlay and Android Auto. Everything synced across devices.
faqPage.cat1a3: Portuguese, English and Spanish. You describe your trip in whichever language you prefer.
faqPage.cat1a4: O plano Free é grátis pra sempre — não é trial. Plus a partir de R$ 14,90/mês ou R$ 79,90/ano. Pro a partir de R$ 19,90/mês ou R$ 99,90/ano. Veja todos os planos em /planos.
faqPage.cat1q5: Does GT work in any country?
faqPage.cat1a5: The waypoint database covers 209 countries across 6 inhabited continents. The AI engine generates routes worldwide. Regional coverage may vary based on point density in the area.
faqPage.cat2q1: How does the AI generate routes?
faqPage.cat2a1: You describe the trip in natural language — destination, regions, road preferences. The AI builds the route in seconds: roads, cities and regional context. Then you choose stops from our waypoint database. You're always in control.
faqPage.cat2a2: On the Free plan, downloads the country you're in with all waypoint categories. On Plus and Pro, unlocks all 209 countries worldwide. Automatic wifi updates work on any plan. GT runs anywhere, even without signal.
faqPage.cat2q3: Does it work with CarPlay and Android Auto?
faqPage.cat2a3: Yes, native integration. You plan the trip on your phone, connect in the car, and everything keeps working on the vehicle's screen.
faqPage.cat2a4: The database started with public OpenStreetMap data, processed and classified by the GT team into 10 categories relevant to overlanders. In development: community validation — overlanders contributing and validating points directly through the app.
faqPage.cat3a1: Free isn't a trial. You use GT free forever, with standard AI, all waypoints, CarPlay and Android Auto. 1 route exported for navigation every 90 days and 1 radar query per day. When you need more, upgrade to Plus or Pro.
faqPage.cat3q2: Can I cancel whenever I want?
faqPage.cat3a2: Yes, no penalty. The plan stays active until the end of the already-paid cycle and then reverts to Free automatically. Your routes and settings are never deleted — in any plan. What changes is only the number of exports for navigation.
faqPage.cat3q3: What's the difference between Plus and Pro?
faqPage.cat3a3: Plus and Pro have the same quality, same delivery, same usability. The difference is only in quantities: Plus limits to 2 exported routes for navigation/month and 5 radar queries/day. Pro is unlimited in both.
faqPage.cat4q1: How do you handle my data?
faqPage.cat4a1: In accordance with data protection laws. We only collect what's necessary to run the app: email for authentication, routes you create to sync across devices, payment data via Asaas (we don't store cards). See the full policy at /privacy.
faqPage.cat4a2: Yes. In the app, go to Profile → Settings → Delete account. Your routes and personal data are removed within 30 days. Technical backups may stay a few more days for service continuity.
faqPage.cat4q3: Can I use GT without an account?
faqPage.cat4a3: You can download and open the app without an account, but to save routes, sync across devices and use the AI, you need to create an account with email.
faqPage.cat5q1: I have a gas station / campsite / guesthouse. How do I appear on GT?
faqPage.cat5a1: The Business Account is in development. When launched, any establishment on travelers' routes (gas stations, campsites, guesthouses, workshops, restaurants) will be able to create a profile and appear to those passing through the region. Sign up for the waitlist at /empresas.
faqPage.cat5q2: How much will the Business Account cost?
faqPage.cat5a2: The Business Account is on the waitlist. When it opens, you can track views, clicks and contacts generated — measurable ROI directly from the dashboard.

hero.desc: Resolve common questions below, or open a ticket. We respond quickly — more complex questions may take a few days.

topicos.desc: Start by checking if your question falls under any of the cases below.
topicos.t1d: Password recovery, login issues, email not arriving.
topicos.t2d: Charge after cancellation, billing cycle, refund.
topicos.t3d: Crash, white screen, feature not working.
topicos.t4t: How to subscribe to Pro / Plus
topicos.t4d: How to upgrade, accepted payment methods.
topicos.t5d: Direct cancellation, timeline, what happens to your routes.
topicos.t6t: The AI generated an incorrect route
topicos.t6d: Wrong address, non-existent stop, route that doesn't make sense.

faq.desc: More detailed answers for common technical issues.
faq.rodapeTexto: Didn't find it? See also the
faq.q1: I'm not receiving the password reset email
faq.a1: Check your spam folder. If it doesn't arrive within 10 minutes, open a ticket below with the account email — we'll reset it manually.
faq.q2: The app froze during a trip
faq.a2: Try force-closing and reopening the app. If it persists, open a ticket with: phone make/model, operating system and version, app version, and what you were doing when it froze.
faq.q3: I cancelled my subscription but it still shows as Pro
faq.a3: The plan stays active until the end of the already-paid cycle. After that it automatically reverts to Free — your routes and settings remain saved. If that period has passed and it still shows as Pro, open a ticket and we'll check.
faq.q4: I bought Pro through Google Play and it wasn't unlocked
faq.a4: There may be a sync delay between Google Play and our server. Wait 30 minutes. If it persists, open a ticket with a screenshot of the Google Play receipt.
faq.q5: I want to delete my account
faq.a5: In the app: Profile → Settings → Delete account. Your routes and personal data are removed within 30 days. Technical backups may stay a few more days for service continuity.
faq.q6: The AI route sent me to a closed place
faq.a6: AI can make mistakes — that's why the review step is part of the flow. Even so, open a ticket with the problematic itinerary: we use it to improve the engine.

ticket.label: Didn't resolve it? Open a ticket
ticket.desc: The more detail you provide (app version, phone make, which screen it happened on), the faster we can resolve it.
ticket.rodape: Before opening a technical issue ticket, update the app to the latest version — most issues are resolved this way.

hero.label: Business Account · Coming soon
hero.titulo: Do you sell to travelers? GT is your channel.
hero.desc: Physical establishment, equipment e-commerce or guide service — the Business Account is the single gateway for those selling in the overlander world to appear to travelers who have already decided to hit the road.

frentes.desc: The same subscription covers all three modalities. You activate the ones that make sense for your business — can be one, two or all.
frentes.f1titulo: Highlight your spot on the map
frentes.f1desc: Physical establishment — gas station, hotel, workshop, campsite, restaurant, tourist attraction. Appears highlighted in the radar of those who have already decided to pass through your region, with custom icon, photo and full details.
frentes.f1exemplos: Gas Stations · Campsites · Hotels · Guesthouses · Workshops · Restaurants · Attractions
frentes.f2desc: E-commerce, manufacturer or distributor of overlander equipment. List your products on GT Desapega with a direct link to your store, marketplace or commercial WhatsApp.
frentes.f2exemplos: Online Stores · Manufacturers · Distributors · Customization · Accessories · Parts
frentes.f3desc: Local guide, expedition driver, 4×4 instructor, route photographer. Appear in relevant regions and routes for those planning travel — before leaving home.
frentes.f3exemplos: 4×4 Guides · Drivers · Instructors · Photographers · Guided Trails · Expeditions

beneficios.desc: Unlike advertising on social media or Google Ads — GT puts you in front of those who have already decided to hit the road.
beneficios.b1d: Appear to those who HAVE ALREADY DECIDED to travel to your region. Not cold traffic — travelers at the exact moment of planning.
beneficios.b2d: Colored box + custom icon on the map, presence on Desapega, featured on destination pages.
beneficios.b3d: During the initial phase, we guide you through registration and activation. No long contracts.
beneficios.b4d: Monthly, no penalty, no commitment. If it doesn't bring results, you leave. Your information stays with you.

comoFunciona.desc: In 4 steps, with support during the initial phase. No long contract.
comoFunciona.p1d: Business data, fronts you'll use, photos and contact
comoFunciona.p2d: We verify the information to ensure quality and database security
comoFunciona.p3d: You receive confirmation and are placed in the priority activation queue when the Business Account opens
comoFunciona.p4d: Appears on the map, Desapega and itineraries according to the fronts you chose — ready to receive travelers

cadastro.label: Registration
cadastro.desc: Fill in the details below and you'll join the Business Account waitlist. When it opens, you'll be notified first and activated with priority.

hero.label: Partnerships
hero.desc: The overlander ecosystem built for those who travel by land isn't just an app — it's everyone who sustains this universe. Creators who tell road stories, brands that equip travelers, services that care for the journey. Let's do it together.

quem.desc: Three major fronts. If you fit any of them, we want to talk.
quem.c1d: Bloggers, YouTubers, podcasters and influencers who cover overlanding, vanlife, motorhome, 4x4 or overland travel.
quem.c2d: Specialty stores, equipment brands, 4x4 accessories, outdoor clothing, overlanding-related auto parts.
quem.c3d: Motorhome and 4x4 rentals, adventure tourism operators, agencies, travel insurance, 24h assistance.

oferta.desc: A good partnership goes both ways. Here's our side.
oferta.o1d: You talk to those who have already decided to travel overland. Not cold traffic — travelers at the exact moment of planning.
oferta.o2d: Unique referral link with recurring commission on every subscription that comes through your channel.
oferta.o3d: Joint campaigns, cross-promotion, editorial content about what you offer.
oferta.o4d: Free Pro access for you to use and create authentic content. Bundles with your offering when it makes sense.

formatos.desc: It's not one-size-fits-all. We adapt the format to what makes sense in your case.
formatos.f1d: Referral link with recurring commission on Pro/Plus subscriptions. Simple model — you refer, you earn.
formatos.f2d: For public figures in the overlander world. Extended benefits, presence in the app, recognition.
formatos.f3d: Honest app review, based on real use. GT provides free Pro access and production support.
formatos.f4d: Joint campaigns, cross-Stories, editorial content about your product/service on our blog.
formatos.f5d: For strategic partners with a digital product. APIs, in-app integrations, bundles. Case by case.

contato.label: Send your proposal
contato.desc: Tell us who you are and what you're imagining. We read every proposal and respond within 5 business days. If it makes sense, we schedule a conversation to design the partnership together.

baixar.label: Free forever
baixar.desc: Available for iOS and Android. Compatible with CarPlay and Android Auto.

blogPage.desc: Destinations, preparation and overlander life for those who travel overland.
blogPage.semArtigos: No articles published yet. Coming soon!
blogPage.planejeSuaViagemDesc: Feeling inspired? Download GT and start planning.
blogPage.semArtigosPilar: No articles published in this pillar yet. Coming soon!
blogPage.pillarDestinosDesc: Routes, destinations and roads across South America — from the northeastern coast to Patagonia, from the Pantanal to the Andes. Overlanders need to understand that each region has its own personality, geography and rhythm. Here we cover what matters for those who want to ride.
blogPage.pillarPreparacaoDesc: Documentation, gear, logistics, borders, basic mechanics. Everything you need to know before setting off, and what to learn along the way. From the first trip to a months-long journey, practical content that gets you out of preparation paralysis.
blogPage.pillarVidaOverlanderDesc: The human side of overland travel. Camping, community, safety, road food, real costs, breakdowns, routines. Stories and lessons from those who live overlanding in practice — not as occasional tourism, but as a way of life.
